name: We Buy Everything - Philadelphia
description_short: Multi-location pawn shop across NJ, PA, and DE buying gold, diamonds, electronics, tools, and collectibles for instant cash.
description_long:
We Buy Everything is a regional pawn shop chain operating 12 storefronts across New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Delaware. The company has established itself as a buyer of valuable items in the tri-state area, with locations in Philadelphia, Merion Station, Springfield, Vineland, Glassboro, Pleasantville, Somerdale, Hamilton, Ewing, Newark, and Wilmington.

The company offers immediate cash transactions for gold, silver, diamonds, electronics, tools, and collectibles. Customers bring items with a valid ID, have them evaluated by trained staff, and receive cash on the spot with no waiting period. The company emphasizes fair valuation and claims to offer the highest payouts in their service area. They specifically highlight expertise in precious metals and diamonds, citing over 30 years of industry experience and extensive connections for maximizing returns.

We Buy Everything differentiates itself through multi-location convenience, same-day cash payment, and stated focus on fair evaluation. The company has capitalized on the rising collectibles market since 2020, promoting the sharp value increases in comics, trading cards, Pokémon, and vintage video games. Their website includes a contact form for general inquiries and lists specific email addresses for each location.

As a traditional pawn shop, the service is straightforward but comes with typical limitations: customers receive immediate liquidity at the cost of potentially lower valuations compared to specialized resellers. The company does not appear to offer redemption loans, buyback periods, or financing options—only outright purchase of items. Customers should understand this is a one-way transaction, not a secured lending product.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 12 convenient locations across three states (NJ, PA, DE) for accessibility
Instant same-day cash payment with no waiting period
Claims over 30 years of industry experience in precious metals and diamonds
Accepts wide variety of items: gold, diamonds, electronics, tools, collectibles, vintage games
No application process or credit check required
Valid ID is the only documentation needed to sell items
Each location has dedicated staff and direct contact email for customer service
cons: Only purchases items outright—no secured loans or redemption options available
Valuations may be lower than specialized buyers or online resellers for certain collectibles
No transparent pricing information or valuation scales published on website
Cannot verify actual payout rates or competitive positioning without visiting locations
Limited online presence for pre-sale consultation or item valuation
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to sell items outright
People with gold, diamonds, or precious metals to liquidate quickly
Collectors or homeowners with vintage electronics, video games, or sports memorabilia
Those without access to specialized resellers or online marketplaces in their immediate area
diagnosis: We Buy Everything is best for consumers who need immediate liquidity and are willing to sell items outright to a pawn shop rather than pursue specialized resale channels. The primary caveat is that pawn shop valuations are typically below what specialized or online resellers offer, and this is a one-time purchase transaction with no redemption or loan component.
services: Collectibles buying (comics, trading cards, Pokémon, vintage video games)
Direct email support for each location
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1900 Grant Ave Unit C, Philadelphia, PA 19115
